title: Bonk
author: Mary Roach
subline: The curious coupling of science and sex.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The word 'BONK' is the cover. Behind it: a giant 2D contour map (topographic lines) suggesting 'the territory' of sex research. ONE contour line is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1200)" fill="none" stroke-width="1.5">
    <!-- A series of nested irregular blob contours (topographic style) centered behind the title. -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="700" ry="320" stroke="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="620" ry="280" stroke="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="540" ry="240" stroke="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="460" ry="200" stroke="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="380" ry="160" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.6"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="300" ry="120" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.7"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="220" ry="80" stroke="#cccccc" opacity="0.8"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="140" ry="40" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="60" ry="16" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <!-- A red dot at the very center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Tiny 'x' marks scattered (sample points) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6">
      <line x1="-500" y1="-100" x2="-490" y2="-90"/>
      <line x1="-490" y1="-100" x2="-500" y2="-90"/>
      <line x1="500" y1="-100" x2="510" y2="-90"/>
      <line x1="510" y1="-100" x2="500" y2="-90"/>
      <line x1="-300" y1="200" x2="-290" y2="210"/>
      <line x1="-290" y1="200" x2="-300" y2="210"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="200" x2="310" y2="210"/>
      <line x1="310" y1="200" x2="300" y2="210"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-250" x2="10" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="-250" x2="0" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="250" x2="10" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="250" x2="0" y2="260"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The word 'BONK' IS the cover — a 540px command-weight UPPERCASE wordmark centered on the page. Behind it: a topographic-style contour map (nested ellipses) suggesting 'the territory of sex research' being mapped by scientists. The innermost two contour rings and the central dot are RED 2.5px. Title is so big it overlaps the contours. Brand 'SCIENCE OF' in the bottom-right; pill '♥' anchors the bottom. The cover doesn't need an image — the word IS the image.
